response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role calls for a director-level individual contributor with 15+ years and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows ~11 years of professional experience (post-2014), only recent and tangential AI exposure (MCP tooling at re:cinq since April 2025), and no evidence of leading AI product/platform strategy, advising strategic customers, or a track record of recognized AI work expected at Principal level.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public talks and workshops
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: Experience falls short of the 15-year minimum at a senior IC level
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise expected at Principal
No evidence of director-level influence, customer advisory, or org-wide strategic leadership
